name: dsgn
description: AI design & prototyping tool — chat on the left, live preview of your repo on the right

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:preview
scripts.test: bun test/pr-body.mjs && electron-vite build && node test/smoke.mjs && node test/open-preview.mjs && node test/chat-render.mjs && node test/select-element.mjs && node test/prop-edit.mjs && node test/prop-edit-svelte.mjs && node test/annotations.mjs && node test/tokens.mjs
scripts.verify: bun test/pr-body.mjs && electron-vite build && node test/smoke.mjs && node test/open-preview.mjs && node test/chat-render.mjs && node test/select-element.mjs && node test/prop-edit.mjs && node test/prop-edit-svelte.mjs && node test/annotations.mjs && node test/tokens.mjs && node test/agent-e2e.mjs
